tour.title: Project Overview & Architecture Roadmap
tour.description: Welcome to CVerify! Start here for a high-level system overview. This guide details CVerify's multi-layered architecture: a React/Next.js frontend, an ASP.NET Core backend, and a FastAPI AI microservice.

tour.title: Backend Entrypoint & Service Configuration
tour.description: Examine the ASP.NET Core bootstrap process in Program.cs. Learn how the application configures dependency injection, registers database contexts, sets up Redis caching, and configures middlewares.

tour.title: Database Context & Initial Seeding
tour.description: Understand the persistence layer. Check the database configuration with EF Core and how role-based permissions are initialized during startup.

tour.title: Backend Exception Handling Strategy
tour.description: Learn how the backend intercepts errors globally to return uniform, structured exception contracts to the client.

tour.title: AI FastAPI Microservice
tour.description: Dive into the python-based microservice that orchestrates CV parsing and Large Language Model tasks. It manages LLM streams, health validation, and communication.

tour.title: Frontend Architecture & Development Guide
tour.description: Begin your client-side journey. Read the frontend architecture developer guidelines, covering routing layout, feature-driven structures, and local environment setup.

tour.title: Client Network Layer
tour.description: Inspect the central API communication layer, constructed with Axios. Discover how auth tokens are attached to request headers and refreshed automatically via interceptors.

tour.title: User Session & Authentication State
tour.description: Understand state handling. Trace the react hook that encapsulates user registration, login, logout, and multi-tab state sync using Zustand and BroadcastChannel.

tour.title: UI Theme & Component System
tour.description: Explore the reusable design system. See how custom wrappers integrate HeroUI and Tailwind CSS to guarantee consistent, responsive, and elegant UI interfaces.
